channel.title: markdown on Lu Xu
channel.description: Recent content in markdown on Lu Xu

item.title: Semi-supervised Image Regression with Deep Kernel Learning
item.description: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) aims at utilizing the vast unlabeled data to help the supervised training. While existing SSL methods have shown promising results on image classification tasks, most of them rely on the cluster assumption that do not apply to image regression tasks. We address the under-studied semi-supervised image regression tasks and propose an algorithm that applies the manifold smoothness theory to image regression tasks.
